<!--
PR template. Lead with the issue trailer + a one-line summary, then fill the sections
below. Delete any section that doesn't apply (Decisions / Known limitations are often
not needed for small PRs). Keep prose tight; bullet by area when a change spans
components. These HTML comments don't render in the posted description.
-->

Closes #___. / Part of #___. <!-- one-line summary of the change -->

## What

<!-- What changes and why — the motivating intent, in plain terms. -->

## How

<!-- Implementation. When it spans components, bullet with a bold area lead-in:
- **Backend:** ...
- **Renderer:** ...
-->

## Build

<!-- Dependency / build / toolchain impacts, if any.
ABI: note the `FRAMELIFT_PLUGIN_ABI_*` bump if the plugin boundary changed,
else state "No ABI change". -->

## Testing

<!-- What was run (`framelift_tests` / `ctest`) and what was verified manually.
CI can't run the Windows exe or GPU paths — call out anything verified locally only. -->

## Decisions

<!-- Optional: notable trade-offs or alternatives rejected. Delete if none. -->

## Known limitations

<!-- Optional: gaps / follow-ups left open by this PR. Delete if none. -->
